title: Email and Activities, and Updates - Single View?
excerpt:
I’m just starting out on Monday CRM as I wanted my emails synced. But I’ve noticed there are now two places to add notes Email and Activities and Updates.

posts.author: bradley-dot (Bradley)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m just starting out on Monday CRM as I wanted my emails synced. But I’ve noticed there are now two places to add notes Email and Activities and Updates.
Is there a single view option so you can read through the all interactions ?
For example Pipedrive has a long activity in chronological order which you can filter by activity type.
I’d prefer just to use Updates as it loads much faster then Email and Activities, if anyone has noticed that?

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a great feature-requests
